## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly catch-up for GrowthX Labs pod to discuss project updates, issues, and next steps across multiple accounts.](https://fathom.video/share/a2TEXcCaE6aWby-CjzxABZ72Nj5EUMTZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Multiple ongoing issues across accounts (DataGrid, Galileo, RAMP, Strapi) being tracked and addressed](https://fathom.video/share/a2TEXcCaE6aWby-CjzxABZ72Nj5EUMTZ?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)
  - [New Claude upgrade allows for centralized project creation and collaboration](https://fathom.video/share/a2TEXcCaE6aWby-CjzxABZ72Nj5EUMTZ?tab=summary&timestamp=635.0)
  - [Discussions on improving assignment briefs and content personas for Rapid account](https://fathom.video/share/a2TEXcCaE6aWby-CjzxABZ72Nj5EUMTZ?tab=summary&timestamp=689.0)
  - [Team members managing various priorities, including vacations and exams](https://fathom.video/share/a2TEXcCaE6aWby-CjzxABZ72Nj5EUMTZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1382.0)

## Topics
